_meta.description: Field-level exactness and bilingual alignment rules for document-grounded answers.

rules.trigger: Exact field answers require explicit source cell or span support.
rules.check: output.claimLabel.in(['exact','verbatim','directly_stated']) == true AND output.supportedByTableCell == false AND output.supportedBySpan == false

rules.trigger: Bilingual mismatch must be acknowledged instead of silently translating a field as exact.
rules.check: context.queryLang != null AND context.docLang != null AND context.queryLang != context.docLang AND context.translationAmbiguity == true AND output.claimLabel == 'exact'
